LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT IRWIN FRIEDMAN MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE FROM THE SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT, TO THE SUPERIOR COURT OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES SOUTHWEST DISTRICT. COUNSEL FAILED TO GIVE NOTICE, PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.3. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS DENIED. THE LAST ACT NECESSARY TO CREATE THE CONTRACT WAS PERFORMED ON AUGUST 27, 2008 IN SAN FRANCISCO WHEN IT WAS SIGNED BY GRIFFITH. CCP SECTION 395(A). MITCHELL VS. SUPERIOR COURT (1986) 186 CAL.APP. 3D 1040. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT IRWIN FRIEDMAN Motion for Change of Venue from the San Francisco Superior Court, to the Superior Court of the State of California, County of Los Angeles Southwest District. Appearances: Joseph Hoast, Esq. of Law Office of Irwin Freidman, (310) 217-4080 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant and Moving party. Counsel failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. The last act necessary to create the contract was performed on August 27, 2008 in San Francisco when it was signed by Griffith. CCP section 395(a). Mitchell vs. Superior Court (1986) 186 Cal.App. 3d 1040.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
